auth0.desc: Auth0 login flow for SyKit sessions; server-side code exchange, stdlib only.

db-base.desc: Document database layer; sqlite by default, driver interface for other backends.

postgres.desc: Native PostgreSQL backend for db-base through psycopg.

postgres-sessions.desc: PostgreSQL backend for the session-store setting; shared, revocable sessions.

resend.desc: Send email through the Resend API.

supabase.desc: Supabase backend for db-base over the project's REST API.

textbelt.desc: Send SMS through the TextBelt API.
